productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Slip On Dark Brown Shoe
description: Take home the trophy for cool casual style in the skechers Diameter-Heisman shoe. With a smooth leather upper and designed as a sport casual slip on, this shoe helps you create an uber cool personlised style statement.  Upper Smooth leather upper in a slip on casual mock design Dual-stitched seam bicycle style toe design with side seam and overlay details Side stripes with perforation accents and canvas edging for breathability Metal stud detailing on the upper to enhance stitch detailing Embossed brand logo Dual side elastic fabric panels for easy slip on Fit Padded collar ad soft fabric shoe lining for snug fit Heel pull on tab for comfortable fit Midsole Cushioned relaxed step comfort insole for step-in comfort Shock absorbing midsole Outsole Flexible traction outsole Wraparound high traction outsole design Small rubber lugs for superior grip Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
